name: Sling Stacking Chair Tan/Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Create a perfect place to sit and relax with this Sling Stacking Chair from Room Essentials™. Supported by a metal frame, this sling chair features a woven back and seat for breathability and has wide arms for extra support. This stackable chair is designed in a tan hue and is resistant to weather and rust, making it perfect for outdoor use.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
